# 📥 Pull Request: New Contribution

Thank you for contributing to the AI Tool Documentation Evaluation repo! Please complete the checklist below to help us review and merge your contribution.

## 📄 Description

<!-- Please describe what this PR adds or changes. Include tool names, type of outputs, etc. -->

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I’ve created a new folder for the tool (if applicable)
- [ ] I’ve included outputs like `README.md`, `api_doc.md`, `process_flow.md`, etc.
- [ ] I’ve followed the naming conventions used in other folders
- [ ] I’ve added links to the README under the appropriate tool section
- [ ] I’ve verified that the documentation is written in clear, readable Markdown
- [ ] All outputs are either openly licensed or were generated in accordance with the tool's terms of use
- [ ] I agree to license this contribution under [CC BY-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/)

## 🧾 Attribution

> Author: [Your Name or GitHub Handle]  
> Based on testing conducted on [Tool Name]  
> Contribution made under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 License

---

Thank you again! We’ll review this PR and provide feedback if needed.
